result_note_zh: 阿根廷在点球大战中以4-2获胜
error_reasons_en: The model underestimated late-game tactical changes and substitution impact.|Penalty events and extra-time fatigue create more variance than a standard Poisson assumption.|Elite finishing converted a larger share of chances than the pre-match baseline.
error_reasons_zh: 模型低估了比赛后段战术变化和替补球员的影响。|点球事件与加时赛疲劳带来的波动高于标准泊松假设。|顶级球员的终结效率高于赛前基线。
